---
title: "Spatial Risk Analysis"
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: load-packages

# Packages will be loaded here once installed.
# library(tidyverse)
# library(sf)
```

## Load data

```{r}
#| label: load-data

# Place raw data files in data/raw/ and load them here.
# Example:
# grower_locations <- read_csv(here::here("data", "raw", "grower_locations.csv"))
# pest_records     <- read_csv(here::here("data", "raw", "pest_records.csv"))
```

## Analysis

<!-- Add spatial analysis steps here. -->
